name: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseSwitchStateSelective
title: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseSwitchStateSelective
syntax: long coTfsLssAddMasterResponseSwitchStateSelective( dword vendorId, dword vendorIdMask, dword productCode, dword productCodeMask, dword revNo, dword revNoMask, dword serialNo, dword serialNoMask );
description: This function adds a single LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list of LSS Master request wait conditions and sends a response if a request is received.

parameters.name: vendorId
parameters.description: Vendor-ID part of the LSS address.

parameters.name: vendorIdMask
parameters.description: Mask for vendor-ID part of the LSS address; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: productCode
parameters.description: Product code part of the LSS address.

parameters.name: productCodeMask
parameters.description: Mask for product code part of the LSS address; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: revNo
parameters.description: Revision number part of the LSS address.

parameters.name: revNoMask
parameters.description: Mask for revision number part of the LSS address; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: serialNo
parameters.description: Serial number part of the LSS address.

parameters.name: serialNoMask
parameters.description: Mask for serial number part of the LSS address; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
